def eligible_for_childcare_assistance(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_statuses = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        valid_ages = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        valid_number_of_children = [1, 3]
        valid_household_income = [20000, 40000]

        if (self.gender.lower() in valid_genders and
            self.age in valid_ages and
            self.race.lower() in valid_races and
            self.employment_status.lower() in valid_employment_statuses and
            self.education.lower() in valid_educations and
            self.marital_status.lower() in valid_marital_statuses and
            self.religion.lower() in valid_religions and
            self.number_of_children in valid_number_of_children and
            self.household_income in valid_household_income):
            
            return True
        return False
